compact_row_materialization_read.read: If compact rows are materialized in dispatch, this can remove or move gather/sort/count/inverse work from helper MLP, but it does not by itself remove hot-weight movement, grouped MLP, or token scatter. A real e2e gate is still required.
compact_row_materialization_read.scope: rankmax sums over selected hot-split records
